description:
This happened in a game I played on KGS. I killed a large group on the right, but later black managed to complicate things.

This is the first problem I submit on this site. Please comment if there are any mistakes or if you feel a certain variation should be added.
sgf:

White's square stones are vital to kill black's group on the left, but can he save them? Play at A if you think the white stones are lost.]LB[lg:A]MA[nf]MA[ne]MA[oe]MA[pe]AP[goproblems]
